name: r4_review_scores
description: R4 review scores per candidate (canonicalized evidence, priority score, predicted label). Produced by scripts/run_canonicalized_review_queue_v1.py and scripts/run_canonicalized_risk_ranking_v1.py. This is a REVIEW OUTPUT (not a scoring input): true_label and oracle_hit legitimately appear for offline metrics computation, and the source-code test tests/test_no_leakage_fields.py verifies they are not used for sorting. Public release MUST strip true_label, oracle_hit, selected_evidence, claim_text, and source_pdf.
notes: This schema describes a REVIEW OUTPUT (post-scoring) — true_label and oracle_hit are present for offline metrics only. Their absence from sorting keys is verified by tests/test_no_leakage_fields.py at the source-code level, NOT by this schema's forbidden_columns_for_scoring list.
The smart_queue_scores.schema.json (the modern SmartQueue output) DOES enforce forbidden_columns_for_scoring because SmartQueue is the canonical scoring input for the review queue.
